prompt: Create a production-ready 2x2 top-down RPG pixel-art idle sprite sheet for one NPC battlefield envoy: Xingdie Luoshi, the Piaomiao Immortal Palace star-ledger envoy stationed at the Three Realms Battlefield. 4 equal cells arranged 2 columns by 2 rows. Each cell shows the SAME character, front-facing 3/4 top-down overworld view, stationary idle only. Subtle in-place animation poses: breathing, translucent sleeve edge sway, one hand holds a pale blue star-ledger command tablet close to the chest, no walking, no attack, no weapon swing, no spell casting, no directional turn. Character: adult female or androgynous mystic cultivator envoy, calm watchful battlefield expression, long dark hair with silver hairpin, flowing white and deep teal immortal palace robes, pale blue star motifs, small jade tablet, official emissary on a battlefield frontier, not an elder, not a merchant. Crisp 16-bit pixel art, dark outline, readable at 96x96 per frame, consistent body scale and bounding box in all 4 cells, feet aligned to same baseline, centered in every cell, safe magenta margins on all sides. Background must be 100% solid flat magenta #FF00FF. No shadows, no labels, no text, no grid lines, no borders, no numbers, nothing crossing cell edges.
